prestazioni: Engine: YBB (Cosworth YB) with forged internals including Mahle Motorsport 94mm forged pistons, Eagle H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth Engineering, supporting 1.5-bar boost levels and 600+ HP with methanol injection
Turbocharger: Garrett GTX4202R with a custom 0.82 A/R turbine housing and 62mm billet compressor wheel, paired with a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and custom 3.5-inch stainless steel downpipe

Fuel System: Full sequential Bosch Motorsport 0280158032 injectors (1,200cc), Walbro 450 LPH in-tank pump, and a custom fuel rail with AN-6 fittings, controlled by a Syvecs S8 ECU with flex-fuel capability and launch control
estetica: Widebody conversion: Kamei RS Cosworth-specific widebody kit with extended front fenders (30mm per side) and rear quarter panels (50mm per side), paired with custom carbon fiber front splitter and rear diffuser from RW Carbon

Suspension: Ohlins Road & Track DFV coilovers with 24-way adjustable damping, custom-valved for the Sierra’s MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear, paired with polybushings from SuperPro (part numbers SPF1025K and SPF1026K)

Aero: Custom rear wing based on the Ford C100 Group C prototype, fabricated in carbon fiber with a 3D-printed aluminum wing mount, adjustable in 5-degree increments, and a custom front canard set from APR Performance (part number GT-250)
